headlines.description: Everton gave Goodison Park a fitting farewell after Iliman Ndiaye scored twice to give the home side a 2-0 victory over already-relegated Southampton.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton win to give Goodison Park fitting farewell

events.name: Nottingham Forest at West Ham United

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest kept alive their hopes of Champions League football next season with a 2-1 Premier League win at West Ham United on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forest dream of UCL after 2-1 win at West Ham

headlines.description: Fulham beat Brentford 3-2 away in a roller-coaster Premier League encounter on Sunday to complete the double over their West London rivals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson stunner sinks Brentford in 3-2 comeback win for Fulham

headlines.description: Jamie Vardy marked his final game for Leicester City with his 200th goal for the club as they beat fellow relegated side Ipswich Town 2-0 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vardy leads Leicester past Ipswich in final game

headlines.description: Arsenal snapped a season-long jinx against Newcastle United with a nervy 1-0 win in their last Premier League home game on Sunday all but securing runners-up spot and a place in next season's Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal relief as Rice goal earns win vs. Newcastle
